value.found_quote: One workflow that's been working great for me is doing a final Plan mode pass before I let Codex execute. ... But in Plan mode, after Codex produces the plan, the UI only lets me click Approve/Implement Plan (or deny).
value.rationale: The page, a community forum thread about OpenAI's Codex (VS Code extension), clearly describes a "Plan mode" feature where Codex produces a plan for the user to review before execution (Approve/Implement Plan or deny). Multiple users discuss using this feature in their workflows, confirming it is an active, available feature. This directly substantiates the claim that OpenAI offers a plan-then-execute mode that produces a reviewable plan before the agent edits anything.
